documentation.text:
@notice Initiating party proposes a renewal with a new expiry date.
         Moves the contract to RenewalPending and auto-approves for the initiator.

@notice Any party can call this to approve a pending renewal.
         When all parties have approved, contract moves back to Validated (Active).

approveRenewal().notice: Any party can call this to approve a pending renewal.         When all parties have approved, contract moves back to Validated (Active).

proposeRenewal(uint256).notice: Initiating party proposes a renewal with a new expiry date.         Moves the contract to RenewalPending and auto-approves for the initiator.
